name: INTERPOL Constitution 1956 (International Criminal Police Organization)
summary: The Constitution of the International Criminal Police Organization (INTERPOL Constitution) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-INTERPOL-treaty framework adopted by the 47 founding states in Vienna — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-police-cooperation framework + second-largest international organisation by membership globally after UN framework (INTERPOL Constitution adopted 13 June 1956 at 25th INTERPOL General Assembly Vienna Austria + International Criminal Police Commission ICPC predecessor founded 7 September 1923 in Vienna Austria at 2nd International Criminal Police Congress + INTERPOL renamed 1956 from ICPC — formal foundational INTERPOL treaty framework establishing comprehensive INTERPOL organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate without police-cooperation framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-police-cooperation framework + second-largest international organisation by membership globally after UN with 196 member states framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Red Notice + Yellow Notice + Blue Notice + Black Notice + Green Notice + Orange Notice + Purple Notice + UN Special Notice 8-color-coded-notice framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal I-24/7 Global Police Communications System framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Notices Commission framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Article 3 Constitution-Neutrality-Apolitical framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Russia-suspension-issues-2022-2024 framework via Russia-NCB-suspension framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Saudi-Arabia-Khashoggi-Red-Notice-misuse 2018-controversy framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal INTERPOL 8-Color-Coded-Notice framework (INTERPOL Notice framework providing formal Red Notice arrest-warrant + Yellow Notice missing-person + Blue Notice information + Black Notice unidentified-body + Green Notice repeat-offender-warning + Orange Notice threat-warning + Purple Notice criminal-modus-operandi + INTERPOL-UN Security Council Special Notice 8-color-coded-notice framework — formal foundational INTERPOL 8-Color-Coded-Notice framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal 8-Color-Coded-Notice framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal INTERPOL Article 3 Constitution-Neutrality-Apolitical framework (INTERPOL Constitution Article 3 framework providing 'It is strictly forbidden for the Organization to undertake any intervention or activities of a political, military, religious or racial character' — formal foundational INTERPOL Article 3 Constitution-Neutrality-Apolitical framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Article 3 Constitution-Neutrality-Apolitical framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal political-military-religious-racial-non-intervention framework), and as the central jurisdiction of the formal INTERPOL Notices Commission framework (INTERPOL Commission for the Control of Files CCF established 1982 + reformed 2017 providing formal individual-petition framework for Red Notice + Yellow Notice review + redress framework — formal foundational INTERPOL Notices Commission framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal individual-petition framework for Notice review + redress framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Notices Commission framework). The INTERPOL Constitution is binding upon 196 INTERPOL member states as of 2026 + Russia-NCB-suspension-issues 2022-2024 framework — substantial universal coverage framework. The Constitution is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal INTERPOL Yellow Notice missing-person framework operates substantial intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-parental-abduction Yellow Notice framework + Hague Convention 1980 INTERPOL coordination framework. The INTERPOL General Assembly + INTERPOL Executive Committee + INTERPOL General Secretariat + INTERPOL Secretary General + INTERPOL Commission for the Control of Files CCF + INTERPOL National Central Bureaus NCBs in each member state are the formal INTERPOL bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The INTERPOL Constitution is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.title: INTERPOL Constitution
statutory_framework.relevance: Constitution of the International Criminal Police Organization adopted 13 June 1956 at 25th INTERPOL General Assembly Vienna Austria — formal foundational INTERPOL treaty framework establishing comprehensive INTERPOL organisation framework.

statutory_framework.title: INTERPOL Constitution Article 3
statutory_framework.relevance: INTERPOL Constitution Article 3 framework on Constitution-Neutrality-Apolitical — formal foundational INTERPOL Article 3 Constitution-Neutrality-Apolitical framework + political-military-religious-racial-non-intervention framework.

statutory_framework.citation: INTERPOL CCF Commission for the Control of Files 1982
statutory_framework.title: INTERPOL CCF
statutory_framework.relevance: INTERPOL Commission for the Control of Files CCF established 1982 + reformed 2017 — formal foundational INTERPOL Notices Commission framework with individual-petition for Notice review + redress framework.

statutory_framework.citation: INTERPOL I-24/7 Global Police Communications System 2003
statutory_framework.title: INTERPOL I-24/7
statutory_framework.relevance: INTERPOL I-24/7 Global Police Communications System operational 2003 — formal foundational INTERPOL Global Police Communications System framework.

apex_courts.name: INTERPOL General Assembly
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for INTERPOL.

apex_courts.name: INTERPOL Secretary General
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for INTERPOL.

apex_courts.name: INTERPOL Commission for the Control of Files (CCF)
apex_courts.role: Formal INTERPOL individual-petition framework body for Notice review + redress framework.

apex_courts.name: INTERPOL National Central Bureaus (NCBs)
apex_courts.role: Formal INTERPOL national-level body in each member state.

anonymisation_convention: INTERPOL-related communications via INTERPOL CCF framework operate formal anonymisation convention per CCF Rules of Procedure on individual-petition framework for Notice review + redress framework.

key_developments.title: 1st International Criminal Police Congress Monaco
key_developments.description: 1st International Criminal Police Congress held 14-20 April 1914 in Monaco — predecessor framework to INTERPOL.

key_developments.title: ICPC predecessor founded Vienna
key_developments.description: International Criminal Police Commission ICPC founded 7 September 1923 in Vienna Austria at 2nd International Criminal Police Congress — predecessor framework to INTERPOL Constitution.

key_developments.title: Nazi-takeover ICPC Berlin relocation
key_developments.description: Nazi Germany took over ICPC + relocated headquarters to Berlin 1938-1945 — formal ICPC Nazi-takeover framework.

key_developments.title: ICPC re-established post-WWII Brussels
key_developments.description: ICPC re-established 1946 in Brussels Belgium post-WWII — formal ICPC re-establishment framework.

key_developments.title: INTERPOL Constitution adopted
key_developments.description: INTERPOL Constitution adopted 13 June 1956 at 25th INTERPOL General Assembly Vienna Austria + INTERPOL renamed from ICPC — formal foundational INTERPOL treaty framework operational.

key_developments.title: INTERPOL Headquarters Lyon
key_developments.description: INTERPOL Headquarters relocated to Lyon France 1989 — formal INTERPOL Lyon Headquarters framework operational.

key_developments.title: INTERPOL I-24/7 Global Police Communications System
key_developments.description: INTERPOL I-24/7 Global Police Communications System operational 2003 — formal foundational INTERPOL Global Police Communications System framework operational.

key_developments.title: Khashoggi Red Notice misuse controversy
key_developments.description: Saudi journalist Jamal Khashoggi assassinated 2 October 2018 in Saudi Consulate Istanbul + Red Notice misuse controversy 2018 + INTERPOL CCF reforms 2017 framework — formal INTERPOL Red Notice misuse framework operational.

key_developments.title: Meng Hongwei disappearance + first Chinese INTERPOL President
key_developments.description: INTERPOL President Meng Hongwei disappeared during China visit September 2018 + detained by Chinese authorities + first Chinese INTERPOL President framework — formal INTERPOL China-controversy framework operational.

key_developments.title: Ahmed Naser Al-Raisi UAE elected INTERPOL President
key_developments.description: Ahmed Naser Al-Raisi UAE elected INTERPOL President 25 November 2021 + controversy over Al-Raisi UAE Internal Security background framework — formal INTERPOL Al-Raisi-controversy framework operational.

key_developments.title: Russia INTERPOL suspension issues + Ukraine NCB Kyiv
key_developments.description: Russia invaded Ukraine 24 February 2022 + INTERPOL Russia NCB suspension issues 2022 framework + Ukraine INTERPOL NCB Kyiv continued operations — formal INTERPOL Russia-NCB-suspension framework operational.

key_developments.title: Sirius Sirois 92nd INTERPOL General Assembly Glasgow
key_developments.description: 92nd INTERPOL General Assembly held 4-7 November 2024 in Glasgow UK + Valdecy Urquiza Brazil elected INTERPOL Secretary General — formal INTERPOL framework operational.

structural_findings: INTERPOL Constitution operates a supranational global binding-treaty framework — places INTERPOL Constitution in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-police-cooperation framework + second-largest international organisation by membership globally after UN framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-police-cooperation framework + second-largest international organisation by membership globally after UN with 196 member states framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Red Notice + Yellow Notice + Blue Notice + Black Notice + Green Notice + Orange Notice + Purple Notice + UN Special Notice 8-color-coded-notice framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal I-24/7 Global Police Communications System framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Article 3 Constitution-Neutrality-Apolitical framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Russia-suspension-issues-2022-2024 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Saudi-Arabia-Khashoggi-Red-Notice-misuse 2018-controversy framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal INTERPOL 8-Color-Coded-Notice framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal 8-Color-Coded-Notice framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal INTERPOL Article 3 Constitution-Neutrality-Apolitical framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Article 3 Constitution-Neutrality-Apolitical framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal political-military-religious-racial-non-intervention framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal INTERPOL Notices Commission framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal individual-petition framework for Notice review + redress framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Notices Commission framework.
196 INTERPOL member state ratification framework with Russia-NCB-suspension-issues 2022-2024 framework is structurally distinctive globally — substantial universal coverage framework.

1914 Monaco Congress + 1923 ICPC + 1938 Nazi-takeover + 1946 re-established + 1956 INTERPOL Constitution + 1989 Lyon + 2003 I-24/7 + 2018 Khashoggi + Meng Hongwei + 2021 Al-Raisi + 2022 Russia + 2024 Glasgow + Urquiza INTERPOL-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

INTERPOL Constitution + Article 3 + 8 Color-Coded Notices + CCF + I-24/7 + NCBs formal sextet framework with formal cross-border-parental-abduction Yellow Notice PA-intersection framework + Hague Convention 1980 INTERPOL coordination framework is structurally distinctive globally.
editorial_notes: INTERPOL Constitution jurisdiction sidecar — supranational global international-police-cooperation foundational-INTERPOL-treaty meta-framework (INTERPOL Constitution 1956 Vienna + Article 3 Constitution-Neutrality-Apolitical + ICPC 1923 Vienna predecessor + Nazi-takeover 1938 + re-established 1946 Brussels + Lyon Headquarters 1989 + I-24/7 2003 + 8 Color-Coded Notices + CCF 1982/2017 + NCBs in 196 states + 1914 Monaco Congress predecessor + 2018 Khashoggi + Meng Hongwei + 2021 Al-Raisi + 2022 Russia + 2024 Glasgow + Urquiza). Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-police-cooperation framework + second-largest international organisation by membership globally after UN with 196 member states + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal 8-Color-Coded-Notice framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Article 3 Constitution-Neutrality-Apolitical framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Notices Commission framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Russia-suspension-issues 2022-2024 + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Saudi-Arabia-Khashoggi-Red-Notice-misuse 2018-controversy + central jurisdiction of formal 8 Color-Coded Notices: Red arrest-warrant + Yellow missing-person + Blue information + Black unidentified-body + Green repeat-offender + Orange threat + Purple criminal-modus-operandi + UN Special + central jurisdiction of formal Article 3 + central jurisdiction of formal CCF individual-petition + 196 INTERPOL member states + 1914 Monaco Congress + 1923 ICPC + 1938 Nazi-takeover + 1946 re-established Brussels + 1956 INTERPOL Vienna + 1989 Lyon + 2003 I-24/7 + 2018 Khashoggi + Meng Hongwei + 2021 Al-Raisi UAE controversy + 2022 Russia NCB suspension + 2024 Glasgow + Urquiza Brazil SG INTERPOL-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator.
